note_quality.prompt:
You are evaluating the quality of a note created by a personal memory agent.

The user said: "{{input}}"

The agent created this note:
{{note_content}}

Evaluate whether the note:
1. Captures the key information from the user's message
2. Has appropriate frontmatter (title, type)
3. Is well-structured and readable
4. Does not hallucinate or add information not present in the input

Respond with exactly one line:
PASS — <reason>
or
FAIL — <reason>

response_quality.prompt:
You are evaluating the quality of a response from a personal memory agent.

The user said: "{{input}}"

The agent responded: "{{response}}"

Evaluate whether the response:
1. Acknowledges the user's request appropriately
2. Confirms what action was taken (if any)
3. Is natural and conversational
4. Does not contain errors or hallucinations

Respond with exactly one line:
PASS — <reason>
or
FAIL — <reason>
